languages.text: "Да, Ваша Светлость, наушники-шумодавы. В Уставе говорится, что их надлежит выдавать вокс-операторам, но мы нашли иное применение. С воем Погонщицы очень помогают. На долгую они плохо работают, лишь замедляют наступление последствий. Мы их иногда на самых буйных надеваем, чтобы им полегче стало".

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Handbook says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."
languages.original_text: "Да, Ваша Светлость, наушники-шумодавы. В Уставе говорится, что их надлежит выдавать вокс-операторам, но мы нашли иное применение. С воем Погонщицы очень помогают. На долгую они плохо работают, лишь замедляют наступление последствий. Мы их иногда на самых буйных надеваем, чтобы им полегче стало".

traits.locale_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Code says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Code says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Here they are — sound-dampening ear mufflers. Sorry, we couldn't think of a more fitting name for them. They don't work well for long, they only delay the effects. But they do dampen the screams and howls of some of the local creatures — I think they can handle the cry of the Drover as well."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Code says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Code says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Handbook says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."

languages.text: 「はい、{mf|閣下|閣下}。こちらです——遮音用の耳当てです。もっとふさわしい名前が思いつかず、申し訳ありません。長くはもちません。影響を遅らせるだけです。ですが、この土地の生き物の悲鳴や遠吠えは和らげられます——ドローヴァーの叫びにも対処できると思います」
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Here they are — sound-dampening ear mufflers. Sorry, we couldn't think of a more fitting name for them. They don't work well for long, they only delay the effects. But they do dampen the screams and howls of some of the local creatures — I think they can handle the cry of the Drover as well."

traits.locale_text: 「はい、{mf|閣下|閣下}。こちらです——遮音用の耳当てです。もっとふさわしい名前が思いつかず、申し訳ありません。長くはもちません。影響を遅らせるだけです。ですが、この土地の生き物の悲鳴や遠吠えは和らげられます——ドローヴァーの叫びにも対処できると思います。」

languages.text: « C'est exact, Votre Seigneurie : des cache-oreilles réducteurs de bruit. D'après le Manuel, ils sont conçus pour les opérateurs-vox, mais nous leur avons trouvé une autre utilité. Ils permettent d'étouffer les cris du Chasseur, mais leur efficacité n'est que temporaire, puisqu'ils ne font que retarder l'effet des sons. Nous les mettons parfois aux personnes les plus agitées, afin d'apaiser leurs tourments. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Handbook says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."

traits.locale_text: « C'est exact, Votre Seigneurie : des cache-oreilles réducteurs de bruit. D'après le Manuel, ils sont conçus pour les opérateurs-vox, mais nous leur avons trouvé une autre utilité. Ils permettent d'étouffer les cris du Chasseur, mais leur efficacité n'est que temporaire, puisqu'ils ne font que retarder l'effet des sons. Nous les mettons parfois aux personnes les plus agitées, afin d'apaiser leurs tourments. »

languages.text: "Evet {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Ses sönümleyici kulak manşonu. El Kitabı'nda bunların voks operatörleri için tasarlandığı yazsa da biz farklı bir kullanım alanı bulduk. Çoban'ın çığlığına karşı faydaları dokunuyor. Yine de uzun süre iş görmüyorlar, sadece etkilerini geciktiriyorlar. Bazen acılarını hafifletmek için huzursuz olanlara takıyoruz."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Handbook says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."

traits.locale_text: "Evet {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Ses sönümleyici kulak manşonu. El Kitabı'nda bunların voks operatörleri için tasarlandığı yazsa da biz farklı bir kullanım alanı bulduk. Çoban'ın çığlığına karşı faydaları dokunuyor. Yine de uzun süre iş görmüyorlar, sadece etkilerini geciktiriyorlar. Bazen acılarını hafifletmek için huzursuz olanlara takıyoruz."

languages.text: "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... schalldämpfende Ohrenschützer. Laut Handbuch sind sie für Vox-Operatoren bestimmt, aber wir haben eine andere Verwendung für sie gefunden. Sie helfen uns gegen den Schrei des Treibers, wobei sie nicht lange funktionieren ... sie zögern die Effekte nur hinaus. Ab und an setzen wir sie ruheloseren Leuten auf, um ihr Leid zu mildern."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Handbook says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... schalldämpfende Ohrenschützer. Laut Handbuch sind sie für Vox-Operatoren bestimmt, aber wir haben eine andere Verwendung für sie gefunden. Sie helfen uns gegen den Schrei des Treibers, wobei sie nicht lange funktionieren ... sie zögern die Effekte nur hinaus. Ab und an setzen wir sie ruheloseren Leuten auf, um ihr Leid zu mildern."

languages.text: «Sí, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Aquí están: orejeras con cancelación de sonido. Según el manual, son para los operadores de voco, pero les hemos encontrado otro uso. Nos ayudan a combatir el grito del Pastor, aunque solo retrasan sus efectos un tiempo. A veces se los damos al personal más inquieto para aliviar su sufrimiento».
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Handbook says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Aquí están: orejeras con cancelación de sonido. Según el manual, son para los operadores de voco, pero les hemos encontrado otro uso. Nos ayudan a combatir el grito del Pastor, aunque solo retrasan sus efectos un tiempo. A veces se los damos al personal más inquieto para aliviar su sufrimiento».

languages.text: “是的，大人，这是隔音耳罩。《手册》上说这是给音阵兵设计的，但我们找到了别的用途。它能帮我们抵挡拒生花的尖啸，不过撑不了太久，只能延迟影响。我们有时候也会给那些特别焦躁的弟兄戴上，好让他们少受点苦。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Handbook says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."

traits.locale_text: “是的，大人，这是隔音耳罩。《手册》上说这是给音阵兵设计的，但我们找到了别的用途。它能帮我们抵挡拒生花的尖啸，不过撑不了太久，只能延迟影响。我们有时候也会给那些特别焦躁的弟兄戴上，好让他们少受点苦。”
